most_negative.title: $NVDA !!!http://Investing.com - Futures on major U.S. stock indexes are pointing higher as investors weigh escalating hostilities in the Middle East and a slew of technology sector reports this week. Iran has reportedly rejected another U.S. ceasefire offer, as the conflict between the two threatens to spread to other parts of the Gulf and further disrupt global oil supplies. U.S. President Donald Trump is imposing double-digit new tariffs on a range of countries, while the artificial intelligence boom is helping chipmaker Intel post better-than-expected quarterly sales.
